revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:布勢神社]]
'''Fuse Shrine''' (布勢神社, Fuse Jinja) refers to several {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}.
* {{ill|Fuse Shrine (Uozu, Toyama)|ja|布勢神社 (魚津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Shrine (Uozu, Toyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504183|1=Fuse Shrine (Uozu, Toyama)}} - Located in {{ill|Uozu, Toyama|en|Uozu, Toyama|qid=Q819613|lt=Uozu, Toyama|1=Uozu, Toyama}}, Toyama Prefecture. One of the candidate sites for a {{ill|Shikinai shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinai shrine|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. * {{ill|Fuse Shrine (Himi, Toyama)|ja|布勢神社 (氷見市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Shrine (Himi, Toyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504186|1=Fuse Shrine (Himi, Toyama)}} - Located in {{ill|Himi, Toyama|en|Himi, Toyama|qid=Q646886|lt=Himi, Toyama|1=Himi, Toyama}}, Toyama Prefecture. Another candidate site for a Shikinai shrine. * {{ill|Fuse Shrine (Akaiwa, Okayama)|ja|布勢神社 (赤磐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Shrine (Akaiwa, Okayama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504187|1=Fuse Shrine (Akaiwa, Okayama)}} - Located in {{ill|Akaiwa|en|Akaiwa|qid=Q415372|lt=Akaiwa, Okayama|1=Akaiwa}}, Okayama Prefecture. One of the candidate sites for a Shikinai shrine. ** {{ill|Fuse Kyo Shrine|ja|布勢巨神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Kyo Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504189|1=Fuse Kyo Shrine}} - Located in {{ill|Akaiwa|en|Akaiwa|qid=Q415372|lt=Akaiwa, Okayama|1=Akaiwa}}, at Naka-sejitsu. A candidate for a Shikinai shrine at the former site of the above shrine. * Fuse Shrine - A Shikinai shrine in {{ill|Sanuki Province|en|Sanuki Province|qid=Q929682|lt=Sanuki Province|1=Sanuki Province}}, Samukawa District. ** {{ill|Fuse Shrine (Sanuki, Kagawa)|ja|布勢神社 (さぬき市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Shrine (Sanuki, Kagawa)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sanuki, Kagawa|en|Sanuki, Kagawa|qid=Q857202|lt=Sanuki, Kagawa|1=Sanuki, Kagawa}}, Kagawa Prefecture. A candidate site for the above shrine. ** {{ill|Zoda Shrine|ja|造田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zoda Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504190|1=Zoda Shrine}} - Located in {{ill|Sanuki, Kagawa|en|Sanuki, Kagawa|qid=Q857202|lt=Sanuki, Kagawa|1=Sanuki, Kagawa}}, Kagawa Prefecture. Another candidate for the above shrine. * {{ill|Fuse Shrine (Nagano)|ja|布制神社 (長野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Shrine (Nagano)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504192|1=Fuse Shrine (Nagano)}} - Located in {{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano, Nagano|1=Nagano (city)}}, Nagano Prefecture, in Shino-no-i Fushigomi-shimo-rokutan.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|布勢神社|version=100150238|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:布勢神社]]
